description_long: This object consists of six golden-brown muffins arranged in two rows of three, resting on a rectangular sheet of parchment paper. Each muffin is domed and generously studded with visible dark blue and purple spots, indicating the presence of blueberries baked into the batter. The tops are slightly uneven and cracked, with some muffins showing more prominent blueberry bursts than others. The muffins have a soft, cake-like texture with a matte, slightly rough surface, and the edges are gently browned. There are no visible wrappers or decorative elements, and the muffins are presented plainly without any frosting or glaze. The parchment paper beneath them is light tan and unadorned, providing a neutral background that highlights the muffins' rustic appearance.
description: Six blueberry muffins with golden-brown tops and visible blueberry spots, arranged on a plain parchment sheet. The muffins are unwrapped, unfrosted, and have a rustic, homemade look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six muffins in two neat rows, with blueberry spots and cracked tops clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the height and rounded tops of the muffins, with the parchment sheet extending forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the muffins, with blueberry distribution and browning on the tops and sides.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the arrangement and spacing of the muffins, as well as the parchment sheet beneath.
